nasb.text: The head of that statue was made of fine gold, its breast and its arms of silver, its belly and its thighs of bronze,

esv.text: The head of this image was of fine gold, its chest and arms of silver, its middle and thighs of bronze,

cnv.text: 這像的頭是純金的，胸膛和手臂是銀的，腹和腰是銅的，

ccb.text: 有纯金的头、银的胸和臂、铜的肚腹和大腿、
